SEARCH
程序包 AccountType

类 CurrentAccount

java.lang.Object
AccountType.Account
AccountType.CurrentAccount
public class CurrentAccount extends Account
Represents a current account type in a banking system. This class extends a general Account class and includes functionalities specific to a current account, such as initializing with a unique account number and managing account creation with time stamps.

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    CurrentAccount()
    Default constructor for creating a new CurrentAccount with an initial balance of 0.0 and a random account number.
    CurrentAccount(double balance, String accountName, String accountPassword, String accountNumber)
    Constructs a new CurrentAccount with specified details.

  • 方法概要

    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    String
    createAccount(String email)
    Creates an account file in the system with initial details and a timestamp.
    static String
    getCurrentTimeString()
    Generates a formatted string representing the current date and time.

    从类继承的方法 AccountType.Account

    deposit, getAccountName, getAccountNumber, getAccountPassword, getBalance, getEmail, parentSetBalance, Random, setAccountName, setAccountNumber, setAccountPassword, setBalance, setEmail, taskFinish, transfer, withdraw

    从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • 构造器详细资料

    • CurrentAccount

      public CurrentAccount()
      Default constructor for creating a new CurrentAccount with an initial balance of 0.0 and a random account number. The account number is prefixed with "CUR" and suffixed with ".txt", indicating a text file storage format.

    • CurrentAccount

      public CurrentAccount(double balance, String accountName, String accountPassword, String accountNumber)
      Constructs a new CurrentAccount with specified details. Allows setting initial balance, account name, account password, and a predefined account number.
      参数:
      balance - the balance
      accountName - the account name
      accountPassword - the account password
      accountNumber - the account number

  • 方法详细资料

    • createAccount

      public String createAccount(String email)
      Creates an account file in the system with initial details and a timestamp. The method constructs a file path based on the provided email and writes the initial account balance and creation timestamp into the file.
      参数:
      email - the email associated with the account, used to construct the file path
      返回:
      the filepath where the account details are stored

    • getCurrentTimeString

      public static String getCurrentTimeString()
      Generates a formatted string representing the current date and time. This method utilizes the 'DateTimeFormatter' to format the current date and time as a string.
      返回:
      a string representation of the current date and time, formatted as "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"
